headline_seed: Walz post calling SCOTUS girls' sports ruling 'cruel' backfires online as critics reveal what's even crueler - Fox News
draft_text:
#BreakingMews: CBS News and Fox News report the U.S. Supreme Court upheld state laws restricting trans athletes in school sports. Minnesota Gov. Walz says state policy will not change.

Not yet verified against the court's primary ruling.
